name: Zia
description_short: Zia Tile is a handmade artisanal tile and stone retailer, not a consumer finance company. The categorization as a payday alternative is factually incorrect.
description_long:
Zia Tile operates as an e-commerce retailer specializing in handmade and artisanal tiles and stone products sourced from around the world. The company positions itself around the concept 'A Modern Home for an Ancient Art,' indicating a focus on traditional craftsmanship applied to contemporary home design. The website content demonstrates a product catalog featuring decorative and functional tiles across multiple material categories and design collections, with no financial services, lending, or credit products offered whatsoever.

The company offers customers the ability to browse, purchase, and manage tile selections through features like wishlist saving, project planning tools, and room-based organization. Their product categories include Terrazzo, Ceramics, Zellige, and Cantera tiles, with named collections such as 'Second Nature,' 'Pattern with Purpose,' and 'Drawn from the Desert.' Customers can purchase individual boxes of standard products or sample products, with distinct checkout processes for each type. The site includes installation guides, FAQs, and standard e-commerce functionality.

Zia Tile distinguishes itself through a curated focus on artisanal and handmade materials with global sourcing, emphasizing design inspiration drawn from natural elements like water, desert landscapes, and butterfly wing geometry. Their collections appear designed for homeowners and designers seeking premium, patterned tile options rather than mass-produced alternatives. The brand narrative emphasizes the intersection of ancient craftsmanship and modern aesthetics.

Critically, Zia Tile is a home improvement product retailer with no consumer finance operations, lending capabilities, credit products, or financial services of any kind. The categorization as a 'payday-alternative' lender is entirely factually incorrect and represents a fundamental miscategorization. This company should not appear on a consumer finance platform.
services: Handmade artisanal tile retail and e-commerce sales
Zellige tile collections with custom color combinations
Cement tile products organized by liquid landscape themes (Shoreline, Currents, River)
Project management and design planning tools
Room-based tile organization for multi-space projects
Sample product ordering for evaluation before full purchase
pros: Curated global sourcing of handmade and artisanal tiles
Multiple design collections with specific aesthetic narratives (Second Nature, Drawn from the Desert, Pattern with Purpose)
Project management tools allowing customers to organize tiles by room and save designs
Offers both sample and full-box product options for evaluation
Provides installation guides and FAQs for customer support
Wide range of tile materials including Terrazzo, Ceramics, Zellige, and Cantera
Named color palettes and pattern collections (e.g., Amber, Racing Green, Skylight combinations)
cons: This company provides zero financial services and should not be listed on a consumer finance platform
The miscategorization as a payday-alternative lender is completely inaccurate and misleading to consumers seeking actual financial products
No indication of pricing, shipping costs, or delivery timelines visible on the homepage content provided
Requires account creation to save projects, which creates friction for browsing-only customers
The mixed cart error (unable to combine sample and standard products in one checkout) creates poor user experience
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: Zia Tile is fundamentally a home improvement e-commerce retailer, not a consumer finance company. The categorization as a payday alternative is completely inaccurate and this company should be removed from any consumer finance platform immediately, as it provides no lending, credit, or financial services whatsoever.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
